evidence.quote: Now let us form the apple. Form, form the apple. And we form the apple. Form, form the apple. Now we peel the apple. Peel, peel the apple. And we peel the apple. Peel, peel the apple. language_modeling.scorer_notes: The transcript shows clear signs of transcript-generation artifacts (massive repetition of identical lines at fixed timestamps), but the underlying observable pattern is consistent: the session is dominated by scripted chants, formulaic greetings, and closed yes/no confirmations. Student utterances are acknowledged but never extended or elaborated. No advanced vocabulary is introduced. The brief open-ended questions that appear are immediately self-answered or followed by the same scripted loop, so they do not constitute genuine language modeling. Score 1 is unambiguous.
